'''Wunana''' was the sibling of [[Renei]], child of [[Quintama]] and [[Pinani]], and grandchild of [[Bicha]] and [[Tiraca]]. Wunana perished alongside Renei in the [[Twenty-Second Battle of Zehava]].

{{Char-stub}}
